name: Falco Tunes
short_description: Falco Tunes is a fun arcade game where you have to collect notes and attack harsh animals with them!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the exciting world of Falco Tunes, an exciting arcade game where you have to fight dangerous animals with the help of musical notes.

Falco Tunes is a fun arcade game where you have to collect notes and attack harsh animals with them! Virtuoso guitarist Sebastian Lurie sets out to conquer jungles, caves, lava and the North Pole with the help of his guitar! Being in the center of the field, the hero automatically attacks! However, you can only attack if the Power score is greater than zero! Collect notes to replenish energy and crush dangerous man-eating beasts!

Features of the game:
  • Different levels with increasing difficulty
  • Old-school gameplay
  • Nice cartoon graphics
